stemHtml: Assuming that an initial "trigger" force is present, the conditions most likely to result in the formation of thunderstorms are…

options.a: high relative humidity and conditional instability throughout a deep layer.
options.b: rapid orographic cooling of cloud containing ice crystals.
options.c: high surface temperature, low dew point and high dry adiabatic lapse rate.
options.d: intense surface heating, anticyclonic pressure system and relatively high freezing level.
